title: penstemon procerus var. formosus
intro: Penstemon procerus var. formosus, also known as Taiwan beardtongue, is a variety of the Penstemon procerus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Penstemon procerus var. formosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
